title: aster alpigenus var. andersonii
intro: Aster alpigenus var. andersonii, also known as the alpine aster or Anderson's alpine aster, is a plant species within the family Asteraceae. It is a flowering plant native to mountainous regions in western North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The alpine aster is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
